Bash(python -c "
import re
with open\(r'C:\\pythonworkspace\\DroidBot\\new-test.html', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

matches = list\(re.finditer\(b'\\xef\\xbf\\xbd', content\)\)
print\(f'Found {len\(matches\)} remaining U+FFFD chars'\)
for m in matches[:20]:
    start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-30\)
    end = min\(len\(content\), m.end\(\)+30\)
    context = content[start:end]
    print\(f'  Position {m.start\(\)}: ...{context!r}...'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import os

files = ['new-test.html', 'devices.html', 'execution.html', 'ai-script.html', 'settings.html', 'reports.html']
for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(r'C:\\pythonworkspace\\DroidBot', f\)
    with open\(path, 'rb'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    fffd = content.count\(b'\\xef\\xbf\\xbd'\)
    has_html_close = content.strip\(\).endswith\(b'</html>'\)
    lines = len\(content.splitlines\(\)\)
    print\(f'{f}: {lines} lines, FFFD={fffd}, closes={has_html_close}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "

" && echo "All files check:" && python -c "
import os
files = ['new-test.html', 'devices.html', 'execution.html', 'ai-script.html', 'settings.html', 'reports.html']
for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(r'C:\\pythonworkspace\\DroidBot', f\)
    with open\(path, 'rb'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    fffd = content.count\(b'\\xef\\xbf\\xbd'\)
    closes = content.strip\(\).endswith\(b'</html>'\)
    lines = len\(content.splitlines\(\)\)
    status = 'OK' if fffd == 0 and closes else 'ISSUE'
    print\(f'  {f}: {lines} lines, FFFD={fffd}, closes={closes} -> {status}'\)
")
